description_long: This house features a modern, low-profile design with a prominent sloped metal roof and a mix of dark and light exterior materials. The structure includes a main central building with an attached side wing, both covered by angular roofs. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property is surrounded by a combination of wooden decking, paved walkways, and landscaped green patches, suggesting outdoor living spaces. The entryway is defined by a set of steps leading to a covered porch area, with a clear overhang for weather protection. The overall layout and materials evoke a modern, functional, and stylish urban residence.
description: A modern, single-story house with a sloped metal roof, dark and light exterior finishes, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry steps, covered porch, and a clear view of the sloped roof and large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the angular roofline, extended wing, and a mix of decking and green landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, additional windows, and the continuation of the roof and outdoor spaces.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the porch area, more windows, and the integration of wood and paved surfaces.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with steps, covered porch, and a pronounced roof overhang.
